_readme: Dependency map for all application procedures. 'depends_on' lists procedures that MUST be implemented first. 'status' is 'done' if already implemented in handlers.go/api.go, 'pending' otherwise. 'priority_layer' is computed: layer 1 = no dependencies (or only 'done' dependencies), layer 2 = depends on layer 1, etc. 'role' is the minimum role required to call the endpoint.

delete_account.notes: DELETE /user — soft delete via deleted_at field

set_user_as_referee.notes: POST /user/referee — already implemented; promotes a user to referee role

set_phone.notes: POST /user/setPhone + POST /user/setPhone/confirm — follows same token flow as set_email

get_my_profile.notes: GET /referee/profile — returns personal info, address, and licenses

submit_license_request.notes: POST /referee/license — submits a license to a mocked external verifier; writes to licenses table on success

update_wages.notes: POST /admin/wages — inserts a new wages row with valid_from=today to preserve history

create_match.notes: POST /admin/match — requires teams and venue to already exist

get_upcoming_matches.notes: GET /matches/upcoming — public endpoint, joins match + teams + venues + accepted assignments

get_completed_matches.notes: GET /matches/completed — public endpoint, returns scores for completed matches

get_match_details.notes: GET /matches/{match_id} — public, comprehensive single match view

cancel_match.notes: POST /admin/match/cancel — also cascades to cancel all active assignments

search_available_referees.notes: GET /admin/referees/available?date=... — filters by availability and excludes already-assigned referees

get_referee_directory.notes: GET /admin/referees — returns all referees with contact and address info

check_pending_assignments.notes: GET /referee/assignments/pending — lists pending assignments for the authenticated referee

respond_to_assignment.notes: POST /referee/assignment/respond — accepts or declines a pending assignment

cancel_assignment.notes: POST /referee/assignment/cancel — cancels a previously accepted assignment

get_referee_schedule.notes: GET /referee/schedule — lists upcoming accepted assignments for the authenticated referee

mark_noshow.notes: POST /admin/assignment/noshow — marks an accepted assignment as 'noshow'

get_match_assignment_history.notes: GET /admin/match/{match_id}/assignments — full audit trail of all assignment statuses for a match

submit_match_score.notes: POST /referee/match/score — crew_chief only; marks match completed and triggers create_pending_payout for each accepted referee

create_pending_payout.notes: Internal procedure, called by submit_match_score. Resolves applicable wage and inserts 'pending' payout.

rate_referee_performance.notes: Already implemented; requires a completed match

get_referee_reviews.notes: GET /admin/referee/reviews — returns all reviews + average rating for a given referee

get_pending_payouts.notes: POST /admin/payouts/pending — takes list of referee_ids and returns pending (not sent) amounts

mark_payouts_sent.notes: POST /admin/payouts/sent — marks all pending payouts for given referee_ids as 'sent'

process_payouts.notes: POST /admin/payouts/confirm — takes list of {payout_id, bank_transaction_id} and marks them as 'paid'

get_payout_history.notes: GET /referee/payouts — full payout history for the authenticated referee

get_monthly_payout_report.notes: GET /admin/payouts/report?year=&month= — aggregate paid totals broken down per referee for a given month
